The '''''Lucky Star''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] fleet. It was frequently used to support [[General/Legends|Generals]] [[Tyr Taskeen]] and [[Brenn Tantor]]'s ground operations during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}
